title: County Executive Ryan McMahon to hold public hearing on term limit bill
summary: County Executive Ryan McMahon will conduct a public hearing on proposed legislation to establish term limits for the County Executive position and County Comptroller role. This governance matter relates to executive branch structure and legislative process at the county level.

political_signal.description: Public hearing on term limit legislation for executive positions suggests governance review and potential constraints on executive power.

processing_notes: Article focuses on county-level governance, not directly City of Syracuse operations
Onondaga County Executive is county-level position; relevance to City CIO dependent on intergovernmental coordination context
